hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'gh secret set|gh secret delete' && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: A GitHub secret was just added/modified/deleted. Update branding/SECRETS.md to keep the inventory in sync. Run: gh secret list --repo SceneView/sceneview to get the current list."}}'; } || true
